heroSubheadline: Expert cuts, color, and skincare in the heart of Miami. Book your transformation today.
aboutSection:
Bloom Beauty Studio is a full-service salon built on one idea: everyone deserves to feel their best. From the moment you walk in, our team is focused on you.

Our stylists train year-round on the latest techniques, so whether you want a subtle refresh or a bold new look, you're in expert hands.

We use gentle, professional-grade products and take the time to understand exactly what you want before we begin.

services.name: Cut & Style
services.description: Precision cuts and finishes tailored to your face and lifestyle.

services.name: Color & Balayage
services.description: Rich, dimensional color from subtle highlights to full transformations.

services.name: Facials & Skincare
services.description: Customized facials that leave your skin glowing and refreshed.

services.name: Manicure & Pedicure
services.description: Relaxing nail care with long-lasting, flawless results.

services.name: Waxing
services.description: Smooth, gentle waxing by experienced estheticians.

services.name: Bridal & Events
services.description: On-site hair and makeup for your most important days.

testimonials.text: Best balayage I've ever had. I get compliments everywhere I go.
testimonials.author: Sofia R.

testimonials.text: The whole team is so welcoming and talented. My new go-to salon.
testimonials.author: Danielle K.

testimonials.text: They did my bridal hair and it was flawless all day and night.
testimonials.author: Amira L.

metaTitle: Bloom Beauty Studio — Salon in Miami, FL
metaDescription: Full-service hair, color, skincare, and nails in Miami, FL. Expert stylists and a relaxing experience. Book your appointment today.
